summary: Iteration 25: Demo Tables + Non-Regression Testing. ALL TESTS PASS. Demo data verified: 8 tables visible on left panel (3 occupied: Table #2 Maria Santos, Table #3 Ricardo Almeida, Table #7 Fernando VIP; 5 available: #1, #4, #5, #6, #8). All existing P0 features verified working without regression.

login_teste_teste_com.description: Login with teste@teste.com / 12345 works, redirects to /venue/home

table_page_shows_8_tables.description: Table page left panel shows 8 tables (#1-#8) with demo data from ensure_demo_tables()

occupied_tables_with_guest_info.description: 3 occupied tables show guest names, tab numbers, servers: Table #2 (Maria Santos, #201, Carlos Silva), Table #3 (Ricardo Almeida, #305, Ana Perez), Table #7 (Fernando VIP, #701, Marco Rossi)

server_selector.description: Server Selector in header opens dropdown with 3 servers (Carlos Silva, Ana Perez, Marco Rossi). Mandatory server rule preserved.

table_context_bar.description: Clicking occupied Table #2 shows context bar with: Table #2, Guest: Maria Santos, Tab #201, elapsed time, Server: Carlos Silva, $45.00

open_available_table_form.description: Clicking available table shows open form with Guest name input + Server selection dropdown. Validation message: 'Server must be selected before opening table'

catalog_items_display.description: Center column shows catalog items (Beers, Cocktails, etc.) with category tabs. Shows IPA Draft $9.00, Lager $8.00, Pilsner $8.00, Stout $9.00

owner_dashboard_view_switcher.description: View switcher works: Business Overview (KPIs), By Venue (per-venue financials), By Event (per-event data)

owner_people_ops_drilldown.description: People & Ops shows 3 Total Operational Staff. BY VENUE and BY EVENT sections with clickable cards. Drill-down modal shows staff: Carlos Silva, Ana Perez, Marco Rossi (all Servers)

manager_guests_sorted_by_spend.description: NFC & Guests shows '4 total guests — sorted by highest spender'. Order: John Smith VIP $450, Maria Lopez $180, Kevin Brown Blocked $90, Juliano $0

manager_guest_profile_modal.description: Clicking guest row opens profile modal with SPEND SUMMARY (Total Spend, Total Tabs, Avg Spend, Visits, Points), EVENT HISTORY, RECENT TABS

home_page_venue_calendar.description: Home page shows venue (Demo Club Updated), calendar for date selection, + New Event button, Enter venue button

api_table_tables.description: GET /api/table/tables returns 8 tables with correct status (3 occupied, 5 available), session_guest, tab_number, server_name

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 25: Demo data addition + non-regression test PASSED. The ensure_demo_tables() function in server.py seeds 8 tables at startup if venue_tables is empty for the demo venue. 3 tables are occupied with active tap_sessions (Maria Santos Tab#201, Ricardo Almeida Tab#305, Fernando VIP Tab#701). All P0 features from previous iterations remain intact: Owner Dashboard view switcher, People & Ops drill-down, Manager Guests sorted by spend with profile modal. Server selection is mandatory for opening tables.
